zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De Pilsdon於1375年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維維利斯可姆時，她的父親John De Pilsdon20歲，母親Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch19歲。她與John le Jewe在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice De Pilsdon于1375年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特維維利斯可姆时，她的父亲John De Pilsdon20岁，母亲Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch19岁。她与John le Jewe在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilsdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: perhaps a variant of Puleston, a habitational name from the Shropshire placename Puleston, or, alternatively, a variant of Poulson with unrounding of the vowel.
perhaps a variant of Pelson (now rare or extinct in Britain), from the Middle English personal name Pell (see Pell ) + son.

variants.name: Poulson
meanings: Americanized form of Danish and Norwegian   Poulsen  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De Pilsdon was born in 1375, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Pilsdon, was 20 and her mother, Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, was 19. She married John le Jewe in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1420, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice De Pilsdon est née en 1375, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Pilsdon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John le Jewe à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice De Pilsdon 1375 in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Pilsdon 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch 19. Sie hat in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom John le Jewe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Pilsdon è nata il nel 1375 nel Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John De Pilsdon, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John le Jewe nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1420, nel Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Pilsdonが1375年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベで生まれた時，父John De Pilsdonは20歳，母Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurchは19歳であった。イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでJohn le Jeweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Pilsdon(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Pilsdon(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 John le Jewe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Pilsdon nasceu em 1375, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Pilsdon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Jewe em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De Pilsdon родилась в 1375 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Pilsdon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Jewe в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice De Pilsdon nació en 1375, en Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Pilsdon, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs. Margery Pilsdon of Whitechurch, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John le Jewe en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1420, en Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
